name: mcp_binder
description: Chrome extension for finding local MCP exposure and browser-origin risk signals.

scripts.validate: node --check src/background.js && node --check src/messages.js && node --check src/scanner.js && node --check src/rebind-evidence.js && node --check src/reporting-labels.js && node --check src/rebind-url.js && node --check src/dashboard-client.js && node --check src/runtime-config.js && node --check src/rebind-bridge-core.js && node --check services/dashboard-server.js && node --check ui/dashboard.js && node --check ui/operator.js && node --check scripts/mock-mcp-lab.js && node --check scripts/framework-cli.js && node --check scripts/validate-rebind-evidence.js && node --check scripts/validate-contracts.js && node --check scripts/validate-dashboard-service.js && node --check scripts/validate-attacker-vm-installer.js && bash -n scripts/setup-attacker-vm.sh scripts/clean-attacker-vm.sh scripts/deploy-attacker-ssh.sh scripts/clean-attacker-ssh.sh scripts/dns-route53-records.sh && node scripts/validate-rebind-evidence.js && node scripts/validate-contracts.js && node scripts/validate-dashboard-service.js && node scripts/validate-attacker-vm-installer.js && node -e "JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('manifest.json', 'utf8')); console.log('manifest ok')"
